LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S SUPPLEMENTAL DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. GRANTED AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS. 6-8. PLAINTIFF SHALL RESPOND BEFORE JUNE 5, 2015. ANY INFORMATION PRODUCED BY PLAINTIFF IN RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS. 6-8 SHALL BE MARKED "CONFIDENTIAL" AND SHALL ONLY BE VIEWED BY THE ATTORNEYS AND THE COURT. FURTHER, THE AMOUNT AND/OR TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT MAY ONLY BE USED FOR PURPOSES OF CALCULATING AN OFFSET AGAINST ANY JURY AWARD. GRANTED AS TO THE SUPPLEMENTAL INTERROGATORIES AND SUPPLEMENTAL REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION. PLAINTIFF SHALL RESPOND TO THESE SUPPLEMENTAL DISCOVERY REQUESTS WITHIN FIVE DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION, SET TWO, IS DENIED AS MOOT BECAUSE OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S REPRESENTATION THAT PLAINTIFF WAIVES ANY CLAIM FOR LOSS OF PAST OR FUTURE EARNINGS. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE HAROLD KAHN; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489 (302/HK)

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF CHARLOTTE ANN MAASSEN AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA (UCSF MEDICAL CENTER)) HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-19-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF CHARLOTTE ANN MAASSEN AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED AND PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ENGAGE OR RESPOND TO DEFENDANT'S ATTEMPTS TO MEET AND CONFER TO APPROPRIATELY SCHEDULE PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO DEPOSE PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ITS DEFENSE. PLAINTIFF SHALL APPEAR FOR HER DEPOSITION NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 3, 2014. PLAINTIFF IS ALSO SANCTIONED FOR MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS AND FOR FAILING TO ENGAGE IN THE MEET AND CONFER PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS SANCTIONED IN THE AMOUNT OF $720, PAYABLE TO DEFENDANT NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 31, 2014. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CONOR MOORE; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant The Regents Of The University Of California's Motion To Compel And Request For Monetary Sanctions is taken off calendar. Duplicative Entry. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/HK)

Amended Notice Of Hearing Defendant The Regents Of The University Of Californias Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendants Special Interrogatories Motion To Compel Responses To Defendant Supplemental Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Jun-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Molly B. Girardi, of Girardi & Keese Lawyers, Tel. 213.977.0211 ext. 398, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Marcell Patrick Neri, of Hassard Bonnington, Tel. 415.288.9800, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court modifies its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant The Regents Of The University Of California's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant's Special Interrogatories, Motion To Compel Responses To Defendant'S Supplemental Discovery Requests is Granted in part and denied in part. Granted as to Special Interrogatories nos. 6-8. Plaintiff shall respond before June 5, 2015. Any information produced by Plaintiff in response to Special Interrogatories nos. 6-8 shall be marked "Confidential" and shall only be viewed by the attorneys and the Court. Further, the amount and/or terms of the settlement agreement may only be used for purposes of calculating an offset against any jury award. Granted as to the Supplemental Interrogatories and Supplemental Requests for Production. Plaintiff shall respond to these supplemental discovery requests within five days of entry of this Order. The Request for Production, Set Two, is denied as moot because of Plaintiff's counsel's representation that Plaintiff waives any claim for loss of past or future earnings. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/HK)
